text.title: Backlog Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Backlog Management. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: capture-intake
step.action: Add new items to Backlog bucket without evaluation.

step.name: groom-weekly
step.action: Promote 8-25 items to Ready with INVEST + AC; demote stale Upcoming.

step.name: audit-and-archive
step.action: Propose archive; surface PR-linked items for human approval.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
